lever.name: QR-preconditioned one-sided Jacobi SVD route
lever.description: Test/rescue a QR-preconditioned SVD path: factor A = Q R, run the existing one-sided Jacobi SVD on R, then map U = Q U_R. The pass started from orphan commit a00dc114 and the poyvi.1 follow-up request.

fresh_profile.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-poyvi1-baseline-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/ --quick --noplot
fresh_profile.route_note: poyvi.1's QR-preconditioned SVD idea does not affect the square svd_48x48 row when guarded for tall matrices; the relevant live public row is the tall SVD-backed pinv_256x128_f64 path.

proof_attempt.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-poyvi1-test-svd2 cargo test -p fj-lax --lib qr_preconditioned_svd_real_preserves_tall_contract -- --nocapture
proof_attempt.coverage: Singular values within tolerance of the existing Jacobi reference, deterministic repeat bits for U/S/V, reconstruction tolerance, orthogonality of U and V.

diagnostic_candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-poyvi1-candidate-pinv cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --quick --noplot
diagnostic_candidate.note: Cross-worker relative to the ovh-a fresh baseline, so not used as the official keep gate. It still points in the same direction as prior same-worker evidence: this QR-preprocess family adds overhead on the tall pinv/SVD path.

behavior_proof.ordering_preserved: Rejected state restores production source to HEAD; no public ordering changes are kept.
behavior_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: Rejected state restores the existing SVD singular-value sorting and cutoff behavior.
behavior_proof.floating_point: Rejected state keeps the existing one-sided Jacobi floating-point recurrence. The QR candidate would have changed operation order and therefore requires tolerance proof; it was not kept.
behavior_proof.rng: No RNG in either current or candidate algorithm.

source_state.source_diff_after_rejection: git diff -- crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs produced no output

next_route.do_not_repeat: Do not retry QR-preprocess-at-2n for pinv256/full-rank or square SVD. The family already regressed on same-worker full-rank evidence and did not show a credible live win.
next_route.deeper_primitive: Route away from poyvi.1 to the next ready profile-backed perf bead, or file a new SVD-core bead for a fundamentally different primitive such as blocked one-sided Jacobi sweeps or Golub-Kahan bidiagonalization with an explicit tolerance contract.
